allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,deps[k]\) for k in ['tsx','chalk','i18next-cli'] if k in deps]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=p.get\('scripts',{}\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in s.items\(\) if 'i18n' in k]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); all_deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\), **p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('tsx:', 'tsx' in all_deps\); print\('chalk:', 'chalk' in all_deps\); print\('i18next-cli:', 'i18next-cli' in all_deps\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=p.get\('scripts',{}\); [print\(k+': '+v\) for k,v in s.items\(\)]")

hooks.command:
# Auto-install dependencies when package.json changes
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ package\.json$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Installing dependencies..."}' >&2
  npm install >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"feedback": "Dependencies installed.", "suppressOutput": true}' || {
    echo '{"feedback": "Failed to install dependencies."}' >&2
    exit 1
  }
fi

# Type-check TypeScript files
if [[ "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then
  echo '{"feedback": "Checking TypeScript types..."}' >&2
  output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1)
  exit_code=$?
  if [ $exit_code -eq 0 ]; then
    echo '{"feedback": "No TypeScript errors.", "suppressOutput": true}'
  else
    errors=$(echo "$output" | grep -A 2 "error TS" | head -30)
    if [ -n "$errors" ]; then
      echo '{"feedback": "TypeScript found type errors:"}' >&2
      echo "$errors" >&2
    fi
  fi
  # Non-blocking
  exit 0
fi
